title: Blog Post

fields.label: Mobile hero image
fields.name: mobile_hero_image
fields.instructions: Shown above the title on mobile only (hidden on desktop). Added for Google Ads conversion. Set the alt text on the image.

fields.label: Hero eyebrow
fields.name: hero_eyebrow
fields.instructions: Optional small label above the title. Leave blank to show the post category instead.

fields.label: Sidebar CTA heading
fields.name: sidebar_cta_heading
fields.instructions: Heading on the in-article and sidebar quote callouts. Leave blank to use the default.

fields.label: Sidebar CTA body
fields.name: sidebar_cta_body
fields.instructions: Supporting line under the sidebar CTA heading. Leave blank to use the default.

description: Optional overrides for a single blog post. Fields left blank fall back to the design copy.
